title.description: Magaca app-ka oo lagu muujiyey madaxa. App-ka helitaanka cuntooyinka dhaqamada adduunka.

subtitle.text: Soo hel cuntooyin ka kala socda adduunka oo dhan
subtitle.description: Qoraalka hoos yimaada magaca app-ka ee madaxa.

heroTitle.description: Cinwaanka ugu weyn ee qeybta hero-ga bogga hore.

heroSubtitle.text: Kusoo dhex soco cuntooyin dhab ah oo ka yimid jikada adduunka oo dhan
heroSubtitle.description: Qoraalka hoos yimaada cinwaanka hero-ga ee bogga hore.

featuredTitle.description: Cinwaanka qeybta oo ka sarreeya shabakadda kaararka cuntada.

cookingTime.description: Summada waqtiga karinta ee kaarka cuntada. {minutes} waxa lagu beddelaa tirada daqiiqadaha.

difficulty.description: Summada ka hor heerka adkaanta ee kaarka cuntada.

easy.description: Summada heerka adkaanta oo muujinaysa cunto fudud.

medium.description: Summada heerka adkaanta oo muujinaysa cunto dhexdhexaad adag.

hard.description: Summada heerka adkaanta oo muujinaysa cunto adag.

ramenDescription.text: Maraq lafaha doofaarka hodan ah oo leh chashu jilicsan, ukun si fiican loo kariyey, iyo baasto cusub.

margheritaDescription.text: Pizza Neapolitan classic ah oo leh yaanyo San Marzano, mozzarella cusub, iyo basil.

tacosName.description: Magaca cunto karinta Tacos al Pastor.

tacosDescription.text: Tacos doofaar marinad leh oo leh canab, cilantro, iyo basal ku yaal tortillas galleyda.
tacosDescription.description: Sharaxaadda cunto karinta Tacos al Pastor.

butterChickenName.description: Magaca cunto karinta Digaag Subag leh.

butterChickenDescription.text: Digaag jilicsan oo ku jira maraq yaanyo iyo subag leh oo leh dhir udgoon.
butterChickenDescription.description: Sharaxaadda cunto karinta Digaag Subag leh.

padThaiDescription.text: Baasto bariis shiilan oo leh shrimp, tofu, laws, iyo maraq tamarind ah.

crepesDescription.text: Krebs khafiif ah oo jilicsan oo buuxda leh Nutella, strawberries cusub, iyo kareem la garaacay.

label.description: Summad la heli karo oo loogu talagalay doorashada luqadda ee madaxa.

en.description: Ikhtiyaarka luqadda Ingiriiska ee beddelaha luqadda.

ja.description: Ikhtiyaarka luqadda Jabaan ee beddelaha luqadda.

es.description: Ikhtiyaarka luqadda Isbaanishka ee beddelaha luqadda.
